title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: Realm of the Gods

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We face off against Silence Suzuka at the
Takarazuka Kinen, and it looks like Manhattan
Cafe manages to get even closer to her friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surpassing her limits during the race, Manhattan
Cafe catches a glimpse of the beyond. Shaken to
hear this, Agnes Tachyon agonizes over the fact
that she can't see such sights herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe believes her races with Silence
Suzuka and Special Week were orchestrated by
her friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though we gave up on the international
race, her friend continues to guide us... For now, I
have no idea what this all means.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But what is clear is that her friend is still with us.
Knowing that, we settle on the Japan Cup for our
next race.
